fields.name: startSeatRow
fields.description: seat row where the deck is starting

fields.name: endSeatRow
fields.description: seat row where the deck is ending

fields.name: startWingsX
fields.description: Start x coordinate of the wings.The wings display starts relatively to the length.

fields.name: endWingsX
fields.description: End x coordinate of the wings.The wings display ends relatively to the length.

fields.name: startWingsRow
fields.description: seat row where the wing is starting

fields.name: endWingsRow
fields.description: seat row where the wing is ending

fields.name: exitRowsX
fields.description: X coordinate of the exit rows.The exit rows are displayed relatively to the length.
